title: Rabiea difformis
taxonomy: Rabiea difformis is classified within the family Aizoaceae, commonly known as the ice plant or viviparous plant family. This family is further divided into several subfamilies. Rabiea difformis specifically falls within the subfamily Ruschioideae. The Ruschioideae subfamily is known for its diverse range of succulent plants. Rabiea difformis is also classified within the genus Rabiea.
uses: Rabiea difformis is a plant species that has been traditionally used in South Africa for its medicinal properties. It has been used to treat various ailments, including fever and respiratory issues.
